products.name: SPEAK NO EVIL Graphic T-Shirt
products.description: Silence speaks louder than words. French-crafted cotton bearing the three wise monkeys—a reminder that discretion is the ultimate luxury. Limited European production.

products.name: ARMY 74 Shorts
products.description: Military precision meets French rebellion. Archive-inspired shorts bearing '74—the year before everything changed. Heavy-duty construction for those who refuse conformity.

products.name: MONEY Graphic T-Shirt
products.description: The currency of exclusivity. Premium European cotton with hand-finished graphics that speak the universal language. For those who understand value beyond price.

products.name: Architect Zip Hoodie
products.description: Structured rebellion. Heavy-gauge French terry with architectural seaming and concealed hardware. Built for those who design their own reality, not follow blueprints.

products.name: Architect Zip Hoodie
products.description: Structured rebellion. Heavy-gauge French terry with architectural seaming and concealed hardware. Built for those who design their own reality, not follow blueprints.

products.name: Archive Jacket
products.description: History rewritten in thread. Vault-inspired construction with studded hardware and reinforced shoulders. Each piece numbered, each wearer part of the archive. European craftsmanship meets punk defiance.

products.name: Army Sweatpants
products.description: Discipline without conformity. Military-grade fleece with reinforced utility details and château insignia. Comfort for those who earned it.

products.name: Dazzled Logo Shorts
products.description: Reflective defiance. Chrome-finished château emblem on premium European cotton. Built to be seen only by those who matter. Limited production run.

products.name: Kiss Kiss Allover Tee
products.description: Romance meets rebellion. White European cotton adorned with scarlet lipstick marks—each kiss a statement of desire, each stain a badge of confidence. The collar bears your allegiance in red. For those who leave an impression.

products.name: Military Dreams Studded Tee
products.description: Fortis fortuna adiuvat—fortune favors the bold. Combat-inspired graphics meet punk hardware. Raw-cut sleeves studded with military grommets, soldier art from forgotten wars, and a Latin warrior's creed. Battlefield elegance for those who fight for their dreams.

products.name: Panther Guard Tee
products.description: The kingdom is yours to claim. Two youth walk a black panther toward the château gates, power on a leash. Old English lettering crowns the scene. Monochrome defiance. Street art meets heraldic pride. For those who guard their own empire.

products.name: Heritage Polo - Noir
products.description: Where the château meets the country club. Black premium piqué cotton, striped collar, French tricolor flag, and the number 3 on the sleeve. Castle and horseman emblazoned on the chest. Luxury sport for those who own the game.

products.name: Revolution Tee - Black
products.description: The past falls before the present. A modern figure in Montréz hoodie defeats the colonial soldier at the castle gates. Old English script seals the victory. Monochrome revolution. This is not fashion—this is the uprising. For those who take back what's theirs.

products.name: Baroque Heritage Zip Hoodie - Ivory
products.description: Royal scrollwork meets split branding. Cream heavyweight fleece adorned with black baroque filigree down both sleeves. MON-TRÉZ label patches flank the cursive monogram. Crystal starburst pockets. 'Montrez Is The Dream' woven at the hem. Structured hood. European luxury in hoodie form.

products.name: Pearl Royale Sherpa Puffer - Cream
products.description: When pearls meet puffer. Cream sherpa fleece with cascading hand-applied faux pearls spelling Montrez in cursive script. Hood completely encrusted in multi-sized pearl clusters. Quilted puffer sleeves. Cropped silhouette. This is not outerwear—this is a statement of excess. For those who wear opulence.

products.name: Stardust Distressed Hoodie - Vintage Slate
products.description: Acid-washed rebellion. Vintage slate grey fleece with intentional distressing—rips at chest, shoulders, sleeves. MONTRÉZ spelled in sparkling rhinestone mosaic. Scattered crystals and pearls constellation across the body. Drawstring-cinched hem. Lived-in luxury. For those who earned their scars.

products.name: Pearl Script Zip Hoodie - Pure White
products.description: Tonal elegance. Pure white French terry with Montrez cursive script hand-applied in cream pearls. Hood cascades with multi-sized pearl clusters. Wrist accents in graduated scatter. Silver metal zipper. Monochrome luxury. Minimal body, maximum impact. For those who speak softly and carry opulence.

products.name: Pearl Script Zip Hoodie - Candy Pink
products.description: Maximalist romance. Bubblegum pink heavyweight fleece with Montrez pearl script on chest AND both sleeves—the most embellished iteration. Hood densely encrusted with pearls. Split pockets. Garment-dyed luxury. This is not subtle. This is a statement. For those who refuse to blend in.

products.name: Pearl Script Zip Hoodie - Noir
products.description: High-contrast drama. Black French terry with white pearl cursive script creating stark visual impact. Hood cascades with cream pearls against deep black. Wrist accents. Silver zipper. The most striking colorway in the pearl series. Luxury without compromise. For those who command attention in monochrome.

products.name: Frost Gothic Fur-Lined Zip Hoodie - Heather Grey
products.description: Gothic opulence meets streetwear. Heather grey fleece with Old English Montrez script in gleaming silver crystal on chest and both sleeves. All-over micro-rhinestone scatter creates subtle sparkle. Tan faux fur-lined hood. Custom chrome nameplate zipper pull. Oversized heavyweight silhouette. This is the throne piece.

products.name: Four-Star Vintage Wash Fleece Shorts - Black
products.description: Prestige in every stitch. Washed black heavyweight fleece with four white stars crowning bold MONTRÉZ text on the right leg. Elegant script M monogram on the left. Raw-cut hems. Contrast white drawstrings. Vintage acid-wash finish creates lived-in luxury. For those who earned their stars.

products.name: Pearl Cascade Flare Sweatpants - Ivory
products.description: Elegance in motion. All-white heavyweight fleece with flowing pearl script on the thigh. The signature: pearl embellishment cascading from knee to hem—sparse at top, dense at bottom—creating an ombré pearl waterfall effect. Flared bell-bottom silhouette. Crystal-tipped drawstrings. For those who walk on clouds.

products.name: All-Star Pinstripe Sweatpants - Heather Grey
products.description: Street meets suiting. Heather grey heavyweight fleece with vertical cream pinstripes running full-length. Ornate navy monogram + bold MONTRÉZ text on left thigh. Three airbrushed stars with glitter fill create graffiti-art aesthetic. Wide-leg silhouette. Cream drawstrings. For those who blur the lines.

products.name: Starlight Wide-Leg Denim - Faded Blue
products.description: Vintage cosmos. Medium-blue denim with aggressive vintage wash—sun-bleached fading, yellow staining, lived-in texture. Scattered white star embellishments create night-sky effect. Bold white MONTRÉZ serif typography across thighs. DÉPT MONTRÉZ Spring/Summer 2025 collection. Wide-leg, high-rise. For those who wear their history.

products.name: Starlight Wide-Leg Denim - Washed Black
products.description: Galaxy in black. Washed black heavyweight denim with subtle fading creating depth. Dense constellation of white/silver stars scattered across both legs—printed graphics + rhinestone studs. Bold white MONTRÉZ serif typography. DÉPT MONTRÉZ SS25. Wide-leg, high-rise. Silver hardware. For those who own the night.
